caption: In a room filled with framed photos and clothing racks, a man wearing a green baseball cap and headphones speaks into a professional microphone. He is dressed in a dark green t-shirt that features the white text "ION NEVER DO SHIT" across the chest. Behind him, a white mannequin wears a white garment, and various pieces of clothing hang on a rack in the background. Two logos are visible on the screen: one on the left featuring a stylized "P" and another on the right that reads "BOOSTLY TOT." As the scene progresses, the man shifts his posture and facial expression, moving from a focused, slightly downturned gaze to an active speaking pose with an open mouth and a smile, while his head tilts slightly toward the microphone. The background elements remain static throughout the sequence.
